title: Ransomware.live connector configuration
description: Imports Ransomware.live v2 free datasets (recentvictims claims, groups catalog) as FollowTheMoney entities. One connector, two datasets, parametrized by `dataset` (opensanctions precedent).

dataset.title: Dataset
dataset.description: Which Ransomware.live v2 dataset this instance imports.

url.title: Feed URL
url.description: URL of the dataset's JSON endpoint (over the SSRF guard). Falls back to the pinned default per dataset when omitted.

limit.title: Record limit
limit.description: Optional cap on the number of records collected (testing / incremental runs).

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: Optional PRO API key (a secret; UI password field, vault-encrypted at rest). The free v2 endpoints used by this connector ignore it; PRO-ready only, no PRO code path.
